description: European Commission reviewing steel safeguard quotas with potential 3-5% reduction for 2026. Hot-rolled coil and cold-rolled products directly affected. Domestic steel prices trending upward.
skf_cost_impact: Steel is 25-30% of bearing production cost. A 5% quota reduction could increase input costs by 2-3% across European factories.
recommended_action: Diversify steel sourcing to India (JSW, Tata) and Turkey. Negotiate long-term supply agreements before quota changes take effect.

actions.action: Negotiate forward contracts with Indian steel mills (JSW, Tata) for Q2-Q3 ring-grade steel
Model cost impact of 3-5% quota reduction across all EU bearing plants
Qualify Turkish flat steel suppliers (Erdemir, Kardemir) for Steyr and Bietigheim
Initiate pricing pass-through discussions with top 20 OEM customers for Q2

description: 25% steel tariffs remain in effect. EU TRQ arrangement provides limited relief but quotas frequently exhausted by mid-year. Aluminum tariffs also impacting packaging costs.
skf_cost_impact: US plants (Waukegan, SLC, Crossville) face higher domestic steel prices. EU-origin bearing imports face derivative steel tariff scrutiny.
recommended_action: Maximize US-sourced steel for domestic production. Monitor TRQ utilization rates for timing of EU steel shipments.

actions.action: Maximize US-sourced steel procurement for all domestic bearing plants
Monitor EU TRQ utilization rates and time EU steel shipments before quota exhaustion
Evaluate derivative steel tariff exposure for EU-manufactured bearings entering US
Negotiate volume agreements with US steel mills (Nucor, US Steel) for preferential pricing

event: EU Anti-Dumping Duties on Chinese Bearings
description: EU maintaining anti-dumping duties of 30-45% on Chinese-origin ball bearings, tapered roller bearings, and certain bicycle bearings. Annual review ongoing with no indication of reduction.
skf_cost_impact: Protective for SKF EU manufacturing. Chinese competitors face 30-45% duty disadvantage. SKF China-to-EU internal transfers subject to related-party scrutiny.
recommended_action: Ensure transfer pricing compliance for intra-group China-EU bearing shipments. Leverage cost advantage vs Chinese competitors in EU market.

actions.action: Ensure transfer pricing documentation compliance for all China-to-EU intra-group bearing transfers
Leverage 30-45% duty advantage in EU market competitive positioning vs Chinese imports
Monitor annual review proceedings for any duty rate changes
Review China plant export mix to minimize EU-destined volumes subject to AD scrutiny

event: China Export Controls on Germanium and Gallium
description: Beijing restricting exports of germanium, gallium, and antimony — critical for semiconductor and advanced materials. Export licensing now required with approval taking 30-60 days.
skf_cost_impact: Indirect impact through semiconductor supply for sensor-integrated bearings. Direct impact on specialty alloy availability for aerospace bearing production.
recommended_action: Map germanium/gallium content in bearing supply chain. Qualify alternative sources from Canada, Belgium, and Japan.

actions.action: Map germanium and gallium content across aerospace bearing and sensor-bearing supply chains
Qualify alternative germanium sources: Umicore (Belgium), Teck (Canada), and Japanese recyclers
Build 6-month buffer stock of critical semiconductor components for sensor-bearing lines
Engage aerospace customers on potential lead time extensions for sensor-integrated bearings

description: EU-India free trade agreement negotiations progressing with target conclusion in 2026. Industrial goods chapter could reduce bearing import duties from current 7.5% to 0% over 5 years.
skf_cost_impact: Positive for SKF India exports to EU. Pune, Ahmedabad, Bangalore factories could serve EU market more competitively. Risk of increased Indian bearing competition in EU.
recommended_action: Position India factories for EU export growth. Prepare competitive analysis of Indian bearing producers who would benefit from FTA.

actions.action: Position Pune-Chakan and Ahmedabad plants for EU export growth under potential FTA
Prepare competitive analysis of Indian bearing producers (NEI, ABC Bearings) who would benefit from duty reduction
Engage EU trade negotiators on rules-of-origin requirements for bearing products
Evaluate India plant capacity expansion for EU-export-grade bearing lines

event: Russia Sanctions — 15th EU Package in Preparation
description: New sanctions package targeting Russian metals, chemicals, and technology sectors. Expanded circumvention measures targeting third-country re-exports through Central Asia and Turkey.
skf_cost_impact: SKF fully exited Russia. Residual risk from third-country circumvention scrutiny. Turkish and Kazakh customer due diligence costs increasing.
recommended_action: Strengthen KYC procedures for customers in circumvention-risk countries. Review Central Asian distributor relationships for sanctions compliance.

actions.action: Strengthen KYC and end-use verification for customers in Turkey, Kazakhstan, and Azerbaijan
Review Central Asian distributor relationships for circumvention risk indicators
Update internal sanctions screening against 15th package entity lists when published
Brief sales teams in Istanbul, Almaty, and Baku on expanded circumvention measures

event: RCEP Utilization Growing for APAC Trade
description: Regional Comprehensive Economic Partnership (RCEP) utilization rates increasing, reducing tariffs on industrial components traded between ASEAN, China, Japan, Korea, and Australia.
skf_cost_impact: Beneficial for intra-APAC component flows. Dalian, Wuhu bearing exports to ASEAN countries benefit from reduced duties. Nilai (Malaysia) plant gains access advantages.
recommended_action: Maximize RCEP certificate of origin usage for APAC shipments. Review rules of origin compliance for China-ASEAN bearing flows.

actions.action: Maximize RCEP certificate-of-origin usage for all intra-APAC bearing shipments
Review rules-of-origin compliance for Dalian and Wuhu exports to ASEAN markets
Evaluate Nilai (Malaysia) as RCEP hub for ASEAN distribution
Train APAC logistics teams on RCEP documentation and preferential tariff procedures

event: US Anti-Dumping Review on Japanese/Chinese Bearings
description: US Department of Commerce conducting annual review of anti-dumping duties on tapered roller bearings from China (up to 92%) and Japan (varying rates). Preliminary results expected Q3.
skf_cost_impact: Protective for SKF US manufacturing operations. Extremely high duties on Chinese bearings virtually eliminate direct competition. Japanese competitors face moderate duties.
recommended_action: Monitor DOC review for any rate changes. Maintain US manufacturing positioning as tariff-advantaged supplier.

actions.action: Monitor DOC preliminary review results for any duty rate changes in Q3
Maintain US-manufactured positioning as tariff-advantaged supplier in customer discussions
Prepare competitive response scenarios if Japanese duty rates are reduced
Ensure all US-origin documentation is audit-ready for customs compliance

sources: US Department of Commerce Federal Register
